name: CSV Parser Plugin
author: Sery Team
description: Parse CSV files and extract column information

functions.name: parse_csv_from_memory
functions.description: Parse CSV and return complete analysis (columns, rows, validity)

functions.name: get_column_count
functions.description: Get number of columns in CSV

functions.name: get_row_count
functions.description: Get number of data rows (excluding header)

functions.name: validate_csv
functions.description: Validate CSV format (all rows same column count)
